message:
fix(api): whitespace-only zone_id validation, session capacity counting, and checkpoint event assertions

fleet_quarantine: Extract validated_zone_id() that trims and rejects
whitespace-only zone IDs. Thread through quarantine, revoke, and status
methods for canonical storage. Add 6 tests: 3 whitespace rejection +
3 normalization round-trip.

session_auth: Fix capacity undercounting where Terminating sessions were
invisible to the capacity check. Add SessionState::occupies_capacity()
method (true for Establishing/Active/Terminating). Update
active_session_count() and establish_session() duplicate-live check to
use it. Emit SCC_MESSAGE_REJECTED event on max-sessions rejection. Add
test verifying Terminating sessions count toward max capacity.

policy_checkpoint: Extend existing test to assert PCK_003_CHECKPOINT_REJECTED
event emission with correct fields (event_name, trace_id, epoch_id,
sequence, channel, detail). No production logic changed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
